name: IO GitHub Sink
description: GitHub-backed bundle sink for the IO pipeline. Hydrates from and writes back to a configured repository path; admin-routable via ENV.client.io.bindings. The GitHub PAT is held server-side under server.secure.proxies.<alias>.headers — never on the client.

github._help: Per-deployment overrides live in ENV.client.io.sinkOverrides.github. The token does NOT belong here — declare a server proxy alias under server.secure.proxies.<proxy> with Authorization: Bearer <% GITHUB_TOKEN %>. See README.md.
